title: eragrostis pusilla
intro: Eragrostis pusilla, also known as Wiregrass, is a species of grass that is native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wiregrass include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Wiregrass can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
